history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person is sitting on an orange folding chair in what appears to be a cafe or co-working space. They are wearing a black hoodie with a Spider-Man design on the hood, featuring red web-like patterns on the sleeves and torso. The person has dark hair and is wearing a black face mask, with their hand resting on their face, suggesting a pensive or thoughtful mood. They are also wearing loose-fitting black pants and light-colored athletic shoes.

The background shows a brightly lit interior with large windows that look out onto a dining area with wooden tables and chairs. The floor is a polished concrete. Several other orange folding chairs and transparent chairs with orange frames are visible, along with small round tables and stools. The lighting is natural and diffused, creating a soft ambiance. The overall color palette consists of blacks, oranges, browns, and grays, with pops of red from the hoodie design. The style is casual and contemporary, with a slightly moody or introspective feel.
